title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focusless-First + Focus Theft Recovery
desc: [RULE] Skill content MUST be in English -- Korean uses 2-3x tokens. PHILOSOPHY: focusless-first is the PRIMARY goal -- if every CDP step is truly focusless, focus theft never occurs and recovery is safety net only. LIVING DOCUMENT: update as each incident is investigated and resolved.
steps: 0. [RULE] ALL skill steps/desc/tags must be English only -- token efficiency.
1. [PHILOSOPHY] Focusless-first: design every CDP action so it never needs OS foreground. Recovery is safety net only. Priority: (1) make action focusless, (2) add recovery as backstop.
2. [MANDATORY] Restore trigger = end of each ask/CDP action only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only, no restore.
3. [MANDATORY] ALL focus restore paths go through InputReadiness.Probe(SkipBlocker/Knowhow/Zoom=true, AutoApproveYield=true) -- fires OnProbeSuccess (auto-hack), sets ReadinessCalled.

4. [FOCUSLESS PATTERN] (a) check already active (visibilityState=visible)->skip, (b) SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8), (c) WaitForWindowStateAsync('minimized') NOT fixed delay, (d) CDP call, (e) RestoreChromeNoActivate SW(4), (f) WaitForWindowStateAsync('normal') NOT fixed delay. Ref: SwitchToTargetAsync, BringToFrontAsync.

5. [INVESTIGATION] When theft occurs: (a) which action, (b) which CDP method, (c) IsFocusStealingMethod() covers?, (d) SW=8?, (e) WaitForWindowState not fixed delay?, (f) RestoreChromeNoActivate after?, (g) OnFocusTheft restores?

6. [CDP RISK METHODS] Page.bringToFront, Target.activateTarget (no-op), Browser.setWindowBounds, Runtime.evaluate+.focus(). Gatekeepers: IsFocusStealingMethod()+IsFocusRiskExpression() in CdpClient.FocusRiskWatchdog.cs.
7. [RESIDUAL RISK] Runtime.evaluate JS .focus() bypasses all CDP-level guards -- only recovery layer catches this.
10. [DONE] SendAsync post-theft + OnFocusTheft callback: ForceForegroundWindow + RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync
14. [DONE] AskGemini prevFg re-capture after persona phase
15. [DONE] DismissDialogAsync: 동의 added + called after file-attach + before insert
16. [TODO] Audit all CDP callers for focusless pattern compliance (setWindowBounds callers, any remaining fixed delays)
author: claude
